title: Harvard Growth Lab Atlas — Country and Regional Classification lookup tables
source_org: Harvard Growth Lab, Harvard Kennedy School
license_terms: Harvard Dataverse, DOI 10.7910/DVN/3BAL1O — cite per Atlas citation guidelines
notes: Codebook tables mapping Atlas country_id to ISO3 codes and names, and country_id to regional/income groupings. Needed to decode country_id in the total-trade-by-country and complexity-rankings CSVs in this same source.
